explanations.8: The 'set -e -x' command makes the shell script stop immediately if any command fails (the -e part) and print each command before running it (the -x part), which helps with debugging.
explanations.16: This line uses variable substitution to build the archive filename by inserting the VERSION value (0.15.1) into the string, so ARCHIVE becomes 'dagger_v0.15.1_linux_amd64.tar.gz'.
explanations.22: The ${ARCHIVE} and ${URL} syntax retrieves the values of those variables that were defined earlier, allowing you to reuse them without typing them out again.
explanations.30: This is missing a hyphen before 'pip' — it should be 'RUN pip install anyio' or continued from the previous 'RUN set -e -x' command above.
